title: delissea coronata
intro: Delissea coronata, also known as the Hawaiian coral bell, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. The medicinal properties of Delissea coronata include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and even help lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Delissea coronata can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in a tea, and it is often used in traditional Hawaiian medicine to promote overall well-being.
